title.en: TRAVELLING OR CAMP EQUIPMENT: SACKS OR PACKS CARRIED ON THE BODY
Travelling or camp articles (travelling rugs A47G9/06); Sacks or packs carried on the body (convertible into other articles A45F4/00)
{Accessories}
{Sacks or packs carried on the body by means of a single strap passing around the neck}
{combined with other objects;  specially adapted for carrying specific objects}
{Sacks or packs carried on the body by means of a single strap around the waist}
{Sacks or packs carried on the body by means of straps passing around an arm or a leg}
{Sacks or packs carried on the body by means of one strap passing around the neck and one additional strap around the waist}
{Sacks or packs carried on the body by means of one strap passing around the waist and additional straps around a leg or an arm}
Sacks or packs carried on the body by means of one strap passing over the shoulder
Sacks or packs carried on the body by means of two straps passing over the two shoulders
Pack-frames carried on the body
Shoulder-pads
Carrying-straps; Pack-carrying harnesses
Water-bottles; Mess-tins; Cups
Hammocks; Hammock spreaders
Hanging seats
Article supports adapted to be stuck into the ground {(posts driven into the ground E04H12/2215)}
Picnic sets (picnic boxes A45C11/20)
Sewing kits
Map-cases used as travelling equipment
Nets affording protection against insects

Travelling or camp articles which may be converted into {other} articles {or into objects} for other use; Sacks or packs carried on the body and convertible into other articles {or into objects for other use}
{Holders or carriers for hand articles, or for use while travelling or camping, convertible into articles for other use}
{Pack-frames, pack-carrying harnesses, carrying straps or shoulder-pads convertible into articles for other use}
Sacks or packs convertible into other articles {or into objects for other use}
Coats or capes convertible into tent coverings
Holders or carriers for hand articles; Holders or carriers for use while travelling or camping
{combined with other objects}
{with an automatic spring reel}
{comprising a suspension strap or lanyard}
{Hand articles fastened to the wrist or to the arm or to the leg}
Fastening articles to the garment
Handles for carrying purposes
Book-carriers
Holders for spades, hatchets or the like implements
{Holders or carriers for portable audio devices, e.g. headphones or digital music players}
{Holders or carriers for portable handheld communication devices, e.g. pagers or smart phones}
{Holders or carriers for portable computing devices, e.g. laptops, tablets or calculators}
{Holders or carriers for cameras}
{Holders or carriers for eyeglasses or spectacles}
{Holders or carriers for thin, flat, rectangular articles, e.g. ID badges or cards}
{Holders or carriers for keys}
{Holders or carriers for tubular, rod-shaped articles, e.g. batons}
{Holders or carriers for portable tools}
{Holders or carriers for beverage vessels, e.g. bottles}
